scripts.kill:8081: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$raw = netstat -ano 2>$null | Select-String ':8081\s'; if ($raw) { $procIds = ($raw | ForEach-Object { ($_ -split '\s+')[-1] }) | Sort-Object -Unique; foreach ($procId in $procIds) { if ($procId -match '^\d+$') { Stop-Process -Id ([int]$procId) -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Write-Output ('Killed PIDs on 8081: ' + ($procIds -join ', ')); Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 1000; } else { Write-Output 'Port 8081 is free.' }"
scripts.start: set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 && set EXPO_NO_DAEMON=1 && node ./node_modules/expo/bin/cli start --max-workers 1
scripts.start:clear: set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 && set EXPO_NO_DAEMON=1 && node ./node_modules/expo/bin/cli start --clear --max-workers 1
scripts.start:dev-client: set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 && set EXPO_NO_DAEMON=1 && node ./node_modules/expo/bin/cli start --dev-client --clear --max-workers 1
scripts.android: set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 && set EXPO_NO_DAEMON=1 && node ./node_modules/expo/bin/cli start --android --max-workers 1
scripts.android:logcat: adb logcat -c && adb logcat ReactNativeJS:V ReactNative:V AndroidRuntime:E *:S
scripts.android:logcat:health: adb logcat -c && adb logcat ReactNativeJS:V ReactNative:V AndroidRuntime:E HealthConnect*:V *:S
scripts.web: set NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 && set EXPO_NO_DAEMON=1 && node ./node_modules/expo/bin/cli start --web --max-workers 1
